name: Method Classification review for Operational Practice and Policy Boundary Update bundle
summary: Accepted. New Meridian and Maine are classified as pre-pilot rule-based machine-scoring QA with no generation model reported. Zhang et al. is classified as GPT-4/GPT-4o training augmentation with held-out student-essay evaluation.

findings.claim_or_issue: The bundle does not infer LLM generation for New Meridian or Maine and does not treat Zhang et al.'s GPT training augmentation as operational policy.
findings.why_it_matters: The evidence only supports the methods actually reported in each source.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the no-LLM classifications for operational QA sources and the research/development classification for Zhang et al.
